---
title: "Chapter 7 Assumptions"
---

::: {.chapter-kicker}
Asymptotic least-squares theory
:::

Chapter 7 now exposes descriptive public condition packages. The older
`Sample...Assumption...` names remain as compatibility aliases where internal
proofs still use the shorter theorem-engine names.

| Assumption | Lean names | Used in proofs |
|---|---|---|
| Moment-level WLLN layer: independent/identically distributed outer products $X_iX_i^\top$, cross products $e_iX_i$, integrability, population Gram nonsingularity, and $\mathbb{E}[e_iX_i]=0$. | Public: <span class="lean-chip">`LeastSquaresConsistencyConditions`</span><br>Compatibility: <span class="lean-chip">`SampleMomentAssumption71`</span> | <span class="use-links">[sample Gram WLLN](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Consistency.lean#L189) [cross-moment WLLN](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Consistency.lean#L261) [OLS consistency](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Consistency.lean#L960)</span> |
| Residual-variance layer extends the WLLN package with independence, identical distribution, and integrability of $e_i^2$. | Public: <span class="lean-chip">`ErrorVarianceConsistencyConditions`</span><br>Compatibility: <span class="lean-chip">`SampleVarianceAssumption74`</span> | <span class="use-links">[error variance consistency](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Consistency.lean#L1343) [homoskedastic covariance consistency](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Consistency.lean#L1460)</span> |
| Score CLT layer extends consistency with full independence of score vectors and $L^2$ integrability of every scalar projection. | Public: <span class="lean-chip">`ScoreCLTConditions`</span><br>Compatibility: <span class="lean-chip">`SampleCLTAssumption72`</span> | <span class="use-links">[score projection CLT](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Normality.lean#L61) [OLS scalar CLT](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Normality.lean#L749) [all-directions wrapper](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Inference.lean#L1618)</span> |
| Robust covariance layer extends the CLT package with true-error score-outer-product WLLN assumptions. | Public: <span class="lean-chip">`RobustCovarianceConsistencyConditions`</span><br>Compatibility: <span class="lean-chip">`SampleHC0Assumption76`</span> | <span class="use-links">[HC0 consistency](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/RobustCovariance.lean#L2852) [HC1/HC2/HC3 wrappers](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/RobustCovariance.lean#L3132)</span> |
| Homoskedasticity is variable-facing: $\mathbb{E}[e_0^2 \mid X_0] = \mathbb{E}[e_0^2]$. | <span class="lean-chip">`HomoskedasticErrorVariance`</span> | <span class="use-links">[score covariance identity](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/RobustCovariance.lean#L238) [homoskedastic t-statistic wrapper](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Inference.lean#L715)</span> |
| Linear model is pointwise for all observations and sample points: $y_i(\omega)=X_i(\omega)^\top\beta+e_i(\omega)$. | <span class="lean-chip">`hmodel : ∀ i ω, y i ω = (X i ω) ⬝ᵥ β + e i ω`</span> | <span class="use-links">[OLS consistency wrapper](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Consistency.lean#L1183) [scalar CLT wrapper](https://github.com/apoorvalal/lean-hansen-econometrics/blob/main/HansenEconometrics/Chapter7Asymptotics/Normality.lean#L749)</span> |
